diagrams.title: Standard vs Randomized Quicksort Partition
diagrams.description: Shows how pivot selection affects partition balance
elements: Pivot at index 0 causes unbalanced (n-1, 0) on sorted array
Random pivot creates balanced partitions (k, n-k-1) on average
Comparison of recursion trees for both approaches

diagrams.title: Recursion Tree of Randomized Quicksort
diagrams.description: Tree structure showing recursive calls and partition sizes
elements: Root node represents full array with first pivot
Each level shows partition sizes after random pivot selection
Tree is balanced on average (log n levels)
Shows O(n log n) work per level total
diagrams.purpose: Visualize recursive structure and understand time complexity

diagrams.title: Lomuto Partition Process
diagrams.description: Step-by-step working of Lomuto partition scheme
elements: Loop j from low to high-1
If arr[j] <= pivot: increment i, swap arr[i], arr[j]
